element_op_code: int32_t a = in0_val, b = in1_val, c = in2_val; int32_t lo, mid, hi; ascend::std::sort3(a, b, c, lo, mid, hi); out0_val = lo; out1_val = mid; out2_val = hi;
golden_code: float lo = in0_ref; if (in1_ref < lo) lo = in1_ref; if (in2_ref < lo) lo = in2_ref; float hi = in0_ref; if (in1_ref > hi) hi = in1_ref; if (in2_ref > hi) hi = in2_ref; expected0 = lo; expected2 = hi; expected1 = in0_ref + in1_ref + in2_ref - lo - hi;
